tool_args.label: Cross Bay Boulevard between 161 Avenue and 165 Avenue traffic signage draft plan

payload.location_text: Cross Bay Boulevard between 161 Avenue and 165 Avenue
payload.description: Diagram showing traffic signage for Cross Bay Boulevard between 161 Avenue and 165 Avenue. The signs indicate traffic flow and bus service: 161 Avenue: Two-way traffic (straight and right-turn lanes). Bus stop: Local (Cross Bay Boulevard). 162 Avenue: Two-way traffic (straight and right-turn lanes). 163 Avenue: One-way traffic (left-turn lane only). Bus stop: SBS Local (Cross Bay Boulevard). 164 Avenue: Two-way traffic (straight and right-turn lanes). 165 Avenue: One-way traffic (right-turn lane only).

normalized_location.raw_text: Cross Bay Boulevard between 161 Avenue and 165 Avenue

tool_args.label: Cross Bay Boulevard at 163 Avenue existing and proposed street layout

payload.description: Diagram comparing existing and proposed street layout at Cross Bay Boulevard at 163 Avenue. Existing: 20' parking/travel lane, 12' travel lane, 12' travel lane, 11' travel lane, 12' travel lane, 12' travel lane, 24' parking/travel lane, 110'-0" total width. Proposed: 20' parking/travel lane, 12' travel lane, 12' travel lane, 11' travel lane, 12' travel lane, 12' travel lane, 24' parking/travel lane, 110'-0" total width. Includes bus stop and bus lane.
